name: Ethan Conner
headline: Undrafted Troy tight end fighting for a Jacksonville roster spot
body:
Conner arrives in Jacksonville as an undrafted free agent out of Troy, where three seasons in a modest receiving role still earned him Second-Team All-Sun Belt recognition. There is no NFL track record to lean on here: no projections, no established depth-chart slot, and no defined connection to the offense. He is essentially a camp body competing for a backup tight end job, and right now he is rostered in close to zero percent of fantasy leagues for good reason.

The schedule notes are the only thing approaching a positive angle, with a soft early stretch against Denver, New England, and Cincinnati and a middling 16th-ranked tight end strength of schedule. But matchups mean nothing without snaps, and Conner has to earn those first. Leave him on the waiver wire and revisit only if he beats out the depth chart and carves out real playing time.
